---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap');

:root {
  --bg: #0e0e0e;
  --surface: #161616;
  --border: #2a2a2a;
  --accent: #c8f04a;
  --accent2: #4af0c8;
  --text: #e8e8e8;
  --muted: #888;
}

body {
  background: var(--bg) !important;
  color: var(--text) !important;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif !important;
  font-weight: 300;
}

#quarto-content, .quarto-container, main {
  background: var(--bg) !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

.project-hero {
  padding: 7rem 4rem 4rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.project-hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -200px; right: -100px;
  width: 500px; height: 500px;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(74,240,200,0.05) 0%, transparent 70%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.back-link {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  text-decoration: none !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}

.back-link:hover { color: var(--accent); }

.project-eyebrow {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: var(--accent2);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.project-hero h1 {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.15;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  color: var(--text);
  max-width: 700px;
}

.project-hero h1 em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--accent);
}

.project-summary {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 1rem;
  max-width: 600px;
  line-height: 1.9;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.hero-meta {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.meta-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.25rem;
}

.meta-label {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.6rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}

.meta-value {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--accent);
}

.hero-btns {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #0e0e0e !important;
  padding: 0.75rem 1.6rem;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  display: inline-block;
}

.btn-primary:hover {
  background: #d9ff5a;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.btn-ghost {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  color: var(--muted) !important;
  padding: 0.75rem 1.6rem;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  display: inline-block;
}

.btn-ghost:hover {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  color: var(--accent) !important;
}

/* CONTENIDO */
.project-body {
  max-width: 860px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 5rem 4rem;
}

.section-block {
  margin-bottom: 4rem;
}

.block-title {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.block-title::after {
  content: '';
  flex: 1;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--border);
}

.block-text {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.9;
}

/* FLUJO */
.flow-diagram {
  background: var(--surface);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 2rem 2.5rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
}

.flow-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.flow-node {
  background: var(--bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: var(--text);
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.flow-node.accent {
  border-color: rgba(200,240,74,0.4);
  color: var(--accent);
}

.flow-node.accent2 {
  border-color: rgba(74,240,200,0.4);
  color: var(--accent2);
}

.flow-arrow {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}

.flow-branch {
  margin-left: 2rem;
  border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding-left: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
}

.flow-branch-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.flow-branch-item span { color: var(--accent2); }

/* STACK TABLE */
.stack-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
}

.stack-table th {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-align: left;
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.stack-table td {
  padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: var(--text);
}

.stack-table td:first-child {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
}

.stack-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }

/* STEPS */
.steps {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
}

.step {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
}

.step-num {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  background: var(--surface);
  border: 1px solid rgba(200,240,74,0.3);
  padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
  margin-top: 0.1rem;
}

.step-content {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.step-content strong {
  color: var(--text);
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* TAGS */
.tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.tag {
  background: var(--surface);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 0.3rem 0.7rem;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  color: var(--muted);
}
</style>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="project-hero">
  <a href="../index.html" class="back-link">← Volver a proyectos</a>
  <div class="project-eyebrow">automatización · personal</div>
  <h1>Bot de registro de<br><em>alimentación y actividad</em></h1>
  <p class="project-summary">
    Bot de Telegram con flujo conversacional para registrar comidas y actividad física desde el celular. 
    Todo se guarda automáticamente en Google Sheets con las fotos en Drive, 
    y termina en un dashboard de Looker Studio.
  </p>

  <div class="hero-meta">
    <div class="meta-item">
      <span class="meta-label">tipo</span>
      <span class="meta-value">Automatización personal</span>
    </div>
    <div class="meta-item">
      <span class="meta-label">stack principal</span>
      <span class="meta-value">Google Apps Script · Telegram API</span>
    </div>
    <div class="meta-item">
      <span class="meta-label">estado</span>
      <span class="meta-value">✓ En uso</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-btns">
    <a href="https://github.com/jimefmoyano/telegram-food-bot" target="_blank" class="btn-primary">→ Ver código en GitHub</a>
    <a href="#flujo" class="btn-ghost">Ver cómo funciona</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CUERPO -->
<div class="project-body">

  <!-- EL PROBLEMA -->
  <div class="section-block">
    <div class="block-title">el problema</div>
    <p class="block-text">
      Quería registrar lo que comía y mis caminatas de forma rápida, desde el celular, 
      sin abrir planillas ni apps de nutrición. El flujo tenía que ser mínimo: 
      mandarle un mensaje a un bot y que todo quedara guardado solo, con foto incluida.
    </p>
  </div>

  <!-- FLUJO -->
  <div class="section-block" id="flujo">
    <div class="block-title">flujo del sistema</div>

    <div class="flow-diagram">
      <div class="flow-row">
        <div class="flow-node accent">Usuario en Telegram</div>
        <div class="flow-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="flow-node">Webhook · Apps Script</div>
        <div class="flow-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="flow-node">¿Qué registramos?</div>
      </div>

      <div class="flow-branch">
        <div class="flow-branch-item">
          <span>Comida</span> → descripción + hora + foto → Drive + Sheets
        </div>
        <div class="flow-branch-item">
          <span>Caminata</span> → pasos + tiempo + km → Sheets
        </div>
        <div class="flow-branch-item">
          <span>Actividad</span> → nombre + rutina → Sheets
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="flow-row" style="margin-top:1rem;">
        <div class="flow-node">Google Sheets</div>
        <div class="flow-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="flow-node accent2">Looker Studio</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- STACK -->
  <div class="section-block">
    <div class="block-title">stack</div>
    <table class="stack-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Herramienta</th>
          <th>Rol</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td>Telegram Bot API</td><td>Interfaz conversacional con el usuario</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Google Apps Script</td><td>Backend y lógica del webhook</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Google Drive</td><td>Almacenamiento de fotos</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Google Sheets</td><td>Base de datos de registros</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Looker Studio</td><td>Dashboard y visualización</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- CÓMO FUNCIONA -->
  <div class="section-block">
    <div class="block-title">cómo funciona la lógica</div>
    <p class="block-text" style="margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
      El bot mantiene el estado de cada conversación usando <code style="color:var(--accent);background:var(--surface);padding:0.1rem 0.4rem;font-size:0.82rem;">PropertiesService</code> 
      de Google Apps Script, guardado por <code style="color:var(--accent);background:var(--surface);padding:0.1rem 0.4rem;font-size:0.82rem;">chatId</code>. 
      El flujo avanza por pasos según el tipo de registro elegido.
    </p>
    <div class="steps">
      <div class="step">
        <span class="step-num">step 0→1</span>
        <div class="step-content"><strong>Inicio</strong> — el bot pregunta qué tipo de registro querés hacer.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="step">
        <span class="step-num">step 2→4</span>
        <div class="step-content"><strong>Comida</strong> — descripción, hora y foto. La imagen se sube a Drive y se guarda el link directo en Sheets.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="step">
        <span class="step-num">step 10→12</span>
        <div class="step-content"><strong>Caminata</strong> — pasos, tiempo y kilómetros.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="step">
        <span class="step-num">step 20→21</span>
        <div class="step-content"><strong>Otra actividad</strong> — nombre de la actividad y descripción de la rutina.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="block-text" style="margin-top:1rem;">
      Escribir <code style="color:var(--accent);background:var(--surface);padding:0.1rem 0.4rem;font-size:0.82rem;">reiniciar</code> o 
      <code style="color:var(--accent);background:var(--surface);padding:0.1rem 0.4rem;font-size:0.82rem;">cancelar</code> en cualquier momento resetea el estado.
    </p>
  </div>

  <!-- TAGS -->
  <div class="section-block">
    <div class="block-title">tecnologías</div>
    <div class="tags">
      <span class="tag">Google Apps Script</span>
      <span class="tag">Telegram Bot API</span>
      <span class="tag">Google Sheets</span>
      <span class="tag">Google Drive</span>
      <span class="tag">Looker Studio</span>
      <span class="tag">JavaScript</span>
      <span class="tag">Webhook</span>
      <span class="tag">Automatización</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
